# Badger Grapple Red Engine v2.4

## Fixed
- B is disabled during live battles; it can no longer forfeit a match.
- Battle results stay on-screen instead of immediately dumping the player back to the map.
- Added visible match log, HP numbers, score, win/recruit prompt, and version marker.
- Dist index explicitly imports `./src_v2_4/main.js`.
- Removed older deployed versioned src folders from dist to reduce cache confusion.

## Verify
The note under the game should say:
`Engine v2.4 battle feedback fix. B is disabled during live matches.`
